description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a beige brick exterior, surrounded by landscaped greenery and several trees. The structure features large rectangular windows of varying sizes, some with white frames, and a mix of open and enclosed balconies. The house includes a small front porch with steps, a white picket fence, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The roofline is mostly flat, with some sections featuring skylights and rooftop access. The rear and side elevations show additional entryways, staircases, and a variety of window placements, contributing to an asymmetrical yet cohesive design. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and designed for comfortable urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, beige brick exterior, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a front porch, balconies, and asymmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a porch, white picket fence, and large windows, with landscaping and trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a secondary entry, exterior staircase, and a mix of window sizes, with trees and shrubs along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a flat roof with rooftop features, and more trees, emphasizing the house's depth and asymmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a covered balcony, patio area, and more landscaping, with a clear view of the house's layered structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, steps, white picket fence, and a simple modern door.
